  (= 
    (wuza $x) 
    (let* 
      ( ($y (* 2 $x)) ($z (superpose (4 5)))) 
      ($y $z)))
;; In file as:  
  !(wuza 5)
;; To unit test case:
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (wuza 5) 
    ( (10 4) (10 5)))

[

;
;; METTA-MORPH-TESTS.LET-SUPERPOSE-LIST.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.002 secs. (1.51 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (wuza 5) 
    ( (10 4) (10 5)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( (10 4) (10 5)) 
      ( (10 4) (10 5))))

    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (wuza 5) 
          ( (10 4) (10 5))) $_3920) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4268) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3920 $_4296) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4296)))))
